store:title: Chiyo Store
hero:title: Next-Gen SSR Analytics Example
hero:desc: Welcome to the Chiyo Gadget Store. This is a real-world multi-page application utilizing Next.js (SSR + CSR) to showcase our lightweight server-side rendering analytics SDK.
timer:badge: You have been on this page for:
feat:duration:title: Duration Tracking
feat:duration:desc: The SDK tracks active stay duration accurately. If you spend less than 1 second on a page, it is ignored to keep metrics clean.
feat:routing:title: Client-Side Transitions
feat:routing:desc: Even with SSR hydration, client-side routing happens without reloading. We hook into page views dynamically to track transitions.
feat:durability:title: Session Durability
feat:durability:desc: Visitor and Session identifiers are automatically stored inside localStorage and sessionStorage to trace persistent journeys.
explain:title: How it works
explain:desc: When navigating using Next.js Link component or router.push, the layout hook calls the SDK:
explain:footer: This sends a pageview beacon containing the previous page stay duration, UTM parameters, visitor/session IDs, and screen resolution. Check the live console below!
catalog:title: Premium Gadget Catalog
catalog:subtitle: Click any product to inspect details. Each navigation triggers client-side pageview beacons.
specs:title: Technical Specifications
console:title: Chiyo Ingest Live Console
console:empty: No analytics events logged yet. Navigate to other pages or refresh to generate events!
console:empty_sub: (Stays lasting < 1 sec are filtered out to prevent noise)
